text: FabTech Microelectronics facility in Taiwan experienced a major power outage and factory fire on July 10. All production lines for SemiChip-AX9 components are halted indefinitely.
Shipment SHP-009 containing SemiChip-AX9 units is delayed by 45 days at Customs due to missing export documentation from FabTech Microelectronics.
Autobahn Motors builds Model-V Electric SUV. Assembly of Model-V requires Control Module CM-40, which exclusively depends on SemiChip-AX9 supplied by FabTech Microelectronics.
